title: Simple Copper Powered Rails
description: Allows Powered Rails to be crafted with Copper.
body:
Allows 6 Powered Rails to be crafted with Copper Ingots rather than Gold Ingots, giving a new use to copper and cheapening the cost of creating minecart systems. This new recipe is shown alongside the traditional Powered Rail recipe in the recipe book after obtaining a standard rail.

![The crafting recipe using copper ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JBuylcmM/images/fde4382ce490ecf7d6c7e972ff6c8dc41c2cd4fc.png)
